title: What Did You Expect? The Archers of Loaf Live at Cat's Cradle
original_title: What Did You Expect: The Archers of Loaf Live at Cat's Cradle
overview: Indie rock icons the Archers of Loaf reunited in 2011, and during the course of their reunion tour played two legendary concerts at Cat’s Cradle in Chapel Hill, NC. Combining in-your-face concert footage along with rare interviews of the band, this film by director Gorman Bechard documents those concerts, and captures the excitement and explosive energy of what its like to see this extraordinary band perform live.
